name: halotools-outlook-workspace
description: npm workspace root for the iusehalo tools — the @iusehalo/halo-api shared client plus the Outlook, Teams, MCP and browser-extension apps.

scripts.build: npm -w @iusehalo/halo-api run build && npm -w halo-outlook-addin run build && npm -w halo-teams-app run build
scripts.build:outlook: npm -w @iusehalo/halo-api run build && npm -w halo-outlook-addin run build
scripts.build:teams: npm -w @iusehalo/halo-api run build && npm -w halo-teams-app run build
scripts.build:mcp: npm -w @iusehalo/halo-api run build && npm -w halo-mcp-server run build
scripts.build:browser-ext: npm -w @iusehalo/halo-api run build && npm -w halo-browser-ext run build
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @iusehalo/halo-api run typecheck && npm -w halo-outlook-addin exec -- tsc -b && npm -w halo-teams-app exec -- tsc -b
